title: Viners Barware Mixing Spoon, 27CM
features: CLASSIC BARWARE | Add a dash of glamour and style to your glass as you professionally mix your favourite layered cocktail with this mixing spoon. Elegantly and expertly crafted, making it the perfect barware accessory.
SIZE | This mixing spoon measures 27 centimetres
DURABILITY | This mixer is hand wash only. Please wash before first use

BARWARE RANGE | Entertain, create and serve with flair and quality thanks to the Viners Barware Collection. Our range has all the tools to professionally entertain guests at home, from bottle storage to cocktail shakers, ice buckets, and straws

VINERS ELEGANCE | Viners has existed for over 110 years and has become a much-loved British brand and household name, steeped in heritage. We pride ourselves on delivering excellence - elegant, robust barware made from the finest quality materials
description: From the manufacturer Clamp Bottle Stopper Waiter's Friend Flat Bottle Opener Double Measure Cocktail Strainer Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Customer Reviews 1.0 out of 5 stars 1 4.5 out of 5 stars 162 4.5 out of 5 stars 5 1.0 out of 5 stars 1 4.0 out of 5 stars 2 Price £9.30 £ 9 . 30 £4.00 £ 4 . 00 £2.45 £ 2 . 45 £9.30 £ 9 . 30 £6.30 £ 6 . 30 Description The Viners lever-arm bottle stoppers are designed to keep wine bottles airtight. A secure way to seal unfinished bottles on most neck sizes. Featuring a handy integrated crown cap bottle opener at the end of the lever arm. The double-lever hinge easily extracts the cork from the bottle in two swift steps. The neat, retractable blade removes foil protection from bottles. It also features a handy, easy to open bottle cap remover. Designed with you in mind, this bar blade is comfortable to hold and use. 18cm in length, to allow great leverage on bottle caps, helping you open the most stubborn capped bottles. It features a hanging hole for convenient storage. Our double measure is essential for measuring accurately when making cocktail drinks or serving spirits when entertaining. It features both single 30ml capacity and a double tot 60ml capacity measures, ideal for pouring like a true bartender. Sieve your drinks and keep them smooth with this Hawthorne style cocktail strainer. It filters out ice, garnish and fruit pieces, and the springs expand to fit over different sized glasses or shakers. It has a hanging hole for neat storage.
